title: Crude Steel Growth
point: India crude steel production increased from 119 Mnt to 165 Mnt during 2021-2025.

title: CAGR
point: Crude steel production grew at about 8-9% CAGR.

title: Hot Metal Share
point: Hot metal share remained around 54-55%.

title: BF-BOF Route
point: BF-BOF remains the backbone of Indian steelmaking.

title: Scrap Share
point: Scrap share improved from about 19% to 22%.

title: Scrap CAGR
point: Scrap usage grew at about 12% CAGR.

title: EAF/IF
point: Scrap growth indicates increasing EAF/IF participation.

title: Circularity
point: Scrap growth shows early circularity integration.

title: DRI
point: DRI growth reflects coal-based and gas-based DRI advantage.

title: Decarbonisation
point: Decarbonisation is incremental, not disruptive.

title: SAIL Expansion
point: SAIL plans hot metal expansion from 20 MT to about 37 MT.

title: Iron Ore Need
point: 19.17 MT crude steel requires about 34.01 MT iron ore.

title: Future Iron Ore
point: Post-expansion iron ore demand estimated at 78 MT.

title: Future Capacity
point: SAIL targets about 100 MT iron ore capacity by FY2030-31.

title: NSP 2017
point: National Steel Policy 2017 targets 300 MTPA steel capacity by FY2030-31.
